content: Just conquered the highest peak in the Philippines! The sunrise at the summit was absolutely breathtaking. Mount Apo, you have my heart forever. The 3-day trek was challenging but so worth every step.

Another amazing group completed our 5-day Siargao island hopping tour! From Cloud 9 to Sugba Lagoon, every stop was pure magic. Thank you to the Santos family for trusting me with your Mindanao adventure!

New T'nalak collection just dropped! Each piece takes 2-3 months to weave by hand. Our master weavers use traditional T'boli patterns that have been passed down for centuries. Support local artisans — every purchase helps preserve Mindanao's cultural heritage.

The Enchanted River lives up to its name! The water is so blue and clear, it doesn't seem real. Arrived just in time for the noon fish feeding — hundreds of fish appearing out of the deep blue. Truly one of Mindanao's hidden gems.

Today I had the privilege of guiding a group of students through our Grand Mosque and the Kutawato Heritage District. Their curiosity and respect for our culture gives me hope. Tourism IS peace-building.
White water rafting in CDO was the highlight of my Mindanao trip! Class IV rapids, stunning gorges, and our guide Marco kept us safe and laughing the entire time. Cannot recommend this enough!
